aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The stars are ambiguous. Your CI/CD pipeline is equally ambiguous.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Your Slack notifications are not. They never are.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — The universe recommends patience. So does the code review that's been open for 6 days.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos suggest stillness. Your git blame does not suggest stillness. Your git blame suggests chaos.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — Two minds, one deployment. Neither is sure.
gemini.prophecy: The stars offer no guidance today. Fortunately, neither does your documentation.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — Stay in. Your production environment would also like to stay in.
cancer.prophecy: The cosmos are silent today. Your error logs are not silent. Your error logs are very loud.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — Even in silence, a Leo ships. The changelog will be long and dramatic.
leo.prophecy: The stars say nothing today. You will interpret this as a sign to refactor the entire frontend.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: No — Virgo requires certainty. You will find one linting error. You will fix 47 things.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos offer only mystery. You will spend the day enabling TypeScript strict mode on a JavaScript repo.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — You'll weigh the pros and cons until the deployment window closes.
libra.prophecy: The scales are balanced. Your PR has 11 approvals and 11 rejections. The cosmic joke writes itself.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: Yes — You will push to main directly. No one will know. You will know.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You have been debugging in silence for four hours. You are not quiet.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Adventure awaits. The adventure is a migration script with no rollback plan.
sagittarius.prophecy: The stars say aim high. Your Docker image is 4GB. Aim lower. Aim much lower.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: No — Capricorn builds systems that last. Today's system is a spreadsheet. It lasts.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos suggest discipline. You will write a 200-line function and call it clean.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — Innovation requires chaos. Your staging environment is prepared to innovate.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos whisper something revolutionary. It is a microservice. It is always a microservice.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — You are adrift in the ocean of legacy code. No deployments from the ocean.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos dream of something beautiful. You are refactoring a jQuery plugin from 2011. Keep dreaming.
